module_sme_rollup.name: Product Definition & Engineering
module_sme_rollup.description: Maintain accurate, versioned product specifications with full change control and traceability.

statements.text: Define multi-level BOMs with components, quantities, alternates, and effectivity dates.
statements.rationale: Foundation for accurate costing and material planning

statements.text: Document routings with ordered operations, work centers, times, and resource requirements.
statements.rationale: Enables scheduling, capacity planning, and labour tracking

statements.text: Manage engineering changes through formal approval with impact assessment on BOM and routing.
statements.rationale: Prevents uncontrolled changes and maintains audit trail

statements.text: Support recipes and formulas for process manufacturing with batch scaling and yield tracking.
statements.rationale: Handles batch and process-specific production requirements

statements.text: Store product documents, certifications, and work instructions linked to item records.
statements.rationale: Ensures operators and inspectors access current specifications

module_sme_rollup.name: Demand & Supply Planning
module_sme_rollup.description: Forecast demand, plan production, and optimize material flow across the supply chain.

statements.text: Generate statistical forecasts and track consumption against demand by item and region.
statements.rationale: Improves forecast accuracy and demand visibility

statements.text: Explode multi-level BOMs and net requirements to generate planned purchase and production orders.
statements.rationale: Ensures material availability and prevents stockouts

statements.text: Apply lot-sizing, safety stock, and reorder-point policies with MRP exception messages.
statements.rationale: Optimizes inventory levels and order timing

statements.text: Perform rough-cut capacity planning and generate master production schedule from S&OP plan.
statements.rationale: Validates demand feasibility against available capacity

statements.text: Support make-to-stock, make-to-order, and configure-to-order modes with automatic BOM generation.
statements.rationale: Handles diverse manufacturing strategies in one system

module_sme_rollup.name: Production Execution & Shop Floor Control
module_sme_rollup.description: Execute work orders, track progress, and capture real-time shop floor data with precision.

statements.text: Create work orders from sales orders or schedule; automatically reserve and issue BOM components.
statements.rationale: Ensures material availability and prevents overselling

statements.text: Display real-time WIP status and operation progress on operator tablets with digital work instructions.
statements.rationale: Improves operator visibility and reduces errors

statements.text: Capture operation start/stop, downtime, scrap, and quality measurements with timestamps and reason codes.
statements.rationale: Enables root-cause analysis and performance tracking

statements.text: Support barcode and lot/serial scanning for material traceability and consumption tracking.
statements.rationale: Ensures accurate genealogy and enables rapid recalls

statements.text: Automatically consume materials from inventory when work orders complete; track WIP separately.
statements.rationale: Maintains accurate inventory and cost allocation

statements.text: Record labour time by operation with distinction between direct and indirect hours.
statements.rationale: Supports payroll and labour efficiency analysis

module_sme_rollup.name: Quality, Compliance & Traceability
module_sme_rollup.description: Ensure product quality, regulatory compliance, and complete supply chain visibility.

statements.text: Execute incoming, in-process, and final inspections with defined characteristics and alert limits.
statements.rationale: Prevents defects from reaching customers

statements.text: Record non-conformances with cause codes; apply lot hold and quarantine status automatically.
statements.rationale: Isolates defective material and enables root-cause analysis

statements.text: Maintain complete lot and serial traceability forward to customer and backward to raw materials.
statements.rationale: Enables rapid recalls and genealogy analysis

statements.text: Generate certificates of analysis and conformance for customer or regulatory submission.
statements.rationale: Demonstrates compliance and supports customer audits

statements.text: Flag hazardous materials with safety data sheets and enforce PPE and lockout/tagout procedures.
statements.rationale: Protects worker safety and meets regulatory requirements

statements.text: Maintain audit trail of all changes, inspections, and incidents linked to lot or serial number.
statements.rationale: Supports regulatory audits and incident investigations

module_sme_rollup.name: Scheduling, Capacity & Performance
module_sme_rollup.description: Optimize resource utilization, identify bottlenecks, and measure manufacturing effectiveness.

statements.text: Display work center load visually with Gantt charts; support infinite and finite capacity modes.
statements.rationale: Enables planners to balance load and identify bottlenecks

statements.text: Respect holidays, shifts, and downtime in capacity calculations; support forward and backward scheduling.
statements.rationale: Produces realistic schedules aligned with actual availability

statements.text: Allow drag-and-drop rescheduling with automatic conflict detection and alert notifications.
statements.rationale: Enables rapid response to disruptions

statements.text: Calculate OEE from availability, performance, and quality; drill down by line, work center, shift.
statements.rationale: Identifies improvement opportunities and tracks progress

statements.text: Report throughput, yield, cycle time, and scrap rate with trend analysis and KPI alerts.
statements.rationale: Enables continuous improvement and early problem detection

module_sme_rollup.name: Costing, Integration & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Calculate accurate product costs, integrate with enterprise systems, and maintain data security.

statements.text: Calculate standard cost from material, labour, and overhead; roll up from components to finished goods.
statements.rationale: Provides accurate product profitability and inventory valuation

statements.text: Roll up actual costs from work orders and calculate variances by category and period.
statements.rationale: Identifies cost drivers and process inefficiencies

statements.text: Integrate with ERP to exchange work orders, completions, and labour data automatically.
statements.rationale: Eliminates manual data entry and ensures consistency

statements.text: Connect to accounting and payroll systems for cost allocation and wage calculation.
statements.rationale: Streamlines financial close and payroll processing

statements.text: Implement role-based access control, audit logging, and two-factor authentication for all users.
statements.rationale: Protects sensitive production and financial data

statements.text: Encrypt data at rest and in transit; maintain PDPA consent and enforce data retention policies.
statements.rationale: Meets regulatory and privacy requirements

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your manufacturing data is accessible, secure, and connected to other business systems. Singapore SMEs need this to let shop-floor staff, planners, and managers access production information from any device—and to comply with data protection regulations that PSG and MAS expect. A typical scenario: your production manager checks real-time output on a mobile phone during a site visit, while your accountant exports costing data to your accounting software without manual re-entry.

Product Engineering.narrative: This family captures and manages the technical definition of what you make—the bill of materials, the sequence of operations, and how changes flow through your products. Singapore SMEs rely on this to avoid costly mistakes when a component changes or a new product launches, and to keep engineering and production in sync. A concrete example: when your supplier changes a component specification, you formally review and approve the change, update your BOM, and notify the shop floor—all in one workflow.

Production Execution.narrative: This family turns your engineering plans into real production work—creating work orders, scheduling them on your machines, and capturing what actually happens on the shop floor in real time. Singapore SMEs need this to meet customer deadlines, keep machines busy, and know exactly where each job is at any moment. A typical scenario: a rush order arrives; the system schedules it into available capacity, operators scan materials and log progress on a tablet, and your manager sees live status updates without walking the floor.

Quality & Compliance.narrative: This family embeds quality checks and traceability into every production step, and tracks compliance with safety and environmental rules. Singapore SMEs must have this to protect customers, meet regulatory audits, and quickly isolate defects if a recall happens. A concrete example: a batch of finished goods fails inspection; the system instantly traces which raw material lots and operations were involved, so you can quarantine only the affected units and investigate root cause.

Planning & Costing.narrative: This family forecasts demand, calculates what materials and capacity you need, tracks inventory through production, and tells you the true cost of each product. Singapore SMEs depend on this to avoid stockouts and overstock, to price competitively, and to spot cost overruns before they hit the bottom line. A typical scenario: your sales forecast feeds into MRP, which automatically generates purchase orders for raw materials and production schedules, while actual production costs are compared to standard to flag inefficiencies.

Maintenance & Analytics.narrative: This family tracks machine health, calculates key performance metrics like OEE, and handles products that need rework or repair. Singapore SMEs should invest in this to maximize uptime, spot performance trends, and reduce scrap and rework costs. A concrete example: your OEE dashboard shows that a work center is running at 65% efficiency; you drill down to see that changeovers are the bottleneck, so you prioritize batch-size optimization.

Subcontract & Outsourced Manufacturing.narrative: This family manages production that you send to external suppliers—tracking materials sent out, monitoring progress, and receiving finished goods back. Singapore SMEs that outsource part of their production should consider this to maintain visibility and quality control over external partners. A typical scenario: you send components to a contract manufacturer for assembly, track their progress, and automatically receive goods back into your inventory when complete.

Digital Thread & Manufacturing Digital T.narrative: This family creates a continuous digital record from product design through production, and builds a simulation model of your factory. Singapore SMEs typically do not need this unless they are in high-complexity, high-volume, or highly regulated sectors—it is more valuable for large enterprises optimizing advanced processes. Consider it only if you are running complex multi-variant production or need to simulate major process changes before implementation.

Multi-Site & Inter-Company Manufacturing.narrative: This family coordinates production across multiple plants or legal entities within your group. Singapore SMEs with a single main factory do not need this; it becomes relevant only when you expand to multiple sites or operate as part of a larger corporate group. If you have plans to open a second factory or consolidate with another company, revisit this capability then.

AI / ML for Manufacturing.narrative: This family applies machine learning to predict quality issues, optimize yield, or detect anomalies in production. Singapore SMEs typically do not have the data maturity or scale to justify this yet; it is most valuable for large, data-rich operations. Start with the foundational analytics and OEE dashboards first; revisit AI/ML once you have 12+ months of clean production data and a clear business case.
